Semanticki DB model\n\n## Pregled entiteta i tablica\n\nAplikacija koristi sljedece EF entitete (tablice):\n- UserProfile\n- Purchase\n- Merchant\n- SpendingSession\n- BudgetPlan\n- WishlistItem\n- Tag\n- PurchaseTags (join tablica za N-N vezu Purchase-Tag)\n\n## Entiteti i glavna svojstva\n\n### UserProfile\n- Id (PK)\n- FirstName\n- LastName\n- Email\n- DateOfBirth\n- MonthlyNetIncome\n- RiskToleranceScore\n- CreatedAt\n\n### Purchase\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- MerchantId (FK -> Merchant)\n- SpendingSessionId (FK, nullable -> SpendingSession)\n- BudgetPlanId (FK, nullable -> BudgetPlan)\n- WishlistItemId (FK, nullable, unique -> WishlistItem)\n- Title\n- Amount\n- Currency\n- PurchasedAt\n- MoodBeforePurchase\n- NeedLevel\n- TriggerType\n- Installments\n- Notes (nullable)\n\n### Merchant\n- Id (PK)\n- Name\n- Category\n- CountryCode\n- IsOnlineOnly\n- AverageDeliveryDays (nullable)\n\n### SpendingSession\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- StartedAt\n- EndedAt (nullable)\n- Platform\n- Channel\n- SessionBudget\n- SpentAmount\n- ItemsViewed\n- ItemsAddedToCart\n- CheckoutCompleted\n\n### BudgetPlan\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- Name\n- ValidFrom\n- ValidTo\n- MonthlyLimit\n- ImpulseCapPercentage\n- EssentialCategoryLimit\n- DiscretionaryCategoryLimit\n- IsActive\n\n### WishlistItem\n- Id (PK)\n- UserProfileId (FK -> UserProfile)\n- Name\n- DesiredPrice\n- CurrentPrice\n- Priority\n- AddedAt\n- TargetPurchaseDate (nullable)\n- Reason\n- IsPurchased\n- LinkUrl\n\n### Tag\n- Id (PK)\n- Name\n- ColorHex\n- Description\n\n## Veze medu tablicama\n\n### 1-N veze\n- UserProfile (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Restrict\n\n- Merchant (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.MerchantId\n  - OnDelete: Restrict\n\n- SpendingSession (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.SpendingSessionId (nullable)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n- BudgetPlan (1) -> Purchase (N)\n  - FK: Purchase.BudgetPlanId (nullable)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> SpendingSession (N)\n  - FK: SpendingSession.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> BudgetPlan (N)\n  - FK: BudgetPlan.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n- UserProfile (1) -> WishlistItem (N)\n  - FK: WishlistItem.UserProfileId\n  - OnDelete: Cascade\n\n### 1-1 veza\n- WishlistItem (1) <-> Purchase (0..1)\n  - FK je na Purchase.WishlistItemId (nullable, unique)\n  - OnDelete: SetNull\n\n### N-N veza\n- Purchase (N) <-> Tag (N)\n  - join tablica: PurchaseTags\n  - kljucevi: PurchasesId, TagsId\n\n## Napomena o modeliranju\n- Routanje i UI sloj su odvojeni od semantickog DB modela.\n- TriggerType je enum u domeni (pohranjuje se kao numericka vrijednost u tablici Purchase).\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_5SIh8ty71HCTr8xnvCVlrwsS__vscode-1776965303095","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

(`{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}`)\n\nZbog toga su neke akcije dostupne preko vise URL-ova.\n\n## URL -> Controller -> Akcija -> View\n\n| URL | Controller | Akcija | View | Tip rute |\n| --- {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T18:40:26.019Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"9e504b1a-b9d3-4825-88cc-5c468bcb3b46","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\lo14l\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\0e9afe2723d4389671589f5b36908849\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\9e504b1a-b9d3-4825-88cc-5c468bcb3b46.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker\\.github\\skills\\mvc-list-page\\SKILL.md","content":"---\nname: mvc-list-page\ndescription: Create or extend an ASP.NET MVC list page (Index) with consistent routing, repository-backed read model, list-to-details linking, full navigation and breadcrumbs, and Lab 2 constraints for this project.\nargument-hint: [entity name] [source repository] [route prefix] [design direction]\n---\n\n# MVC List Page Skill (Lab 2)\n\nUse this skill when the user asks to build or extend a list page in this repository.\n\n## When to use\n\nUse this skill for requests like:\n- \"Napravi novu list stranicu\"\n- \"Dodaj Index za novi entitet\"\n- \"Pro+íiri postoje-çi list prikaz\"\n- \"Pove++i listu s details stranicom\"\n\nDo not use this skill for edit/create workflows unless the user explicitly asks for that.\n\n## Project constraints you must enforce\n\n- Implement only Index and Details for entities unless explicitly requested otherwise.\n- Keep links between list and details pages.\n- Maintain complete navigation (menu and breadcrumbs).\n- Prefer mock repository data flow and MVC conventions.\n- Preserve existing project patterns and naming.\n\n## Required implementation workflow\n\n1. Inspect current patterns first:\n- Read existing Index pages in Views/*/Index.cshtml.\n- Read the matching controller patterns in Controllers/*Controller.cs.\n- Reuse existing route style (attribute routes plus default route compatibility).\n\n2. Add or update controller Index action:\n- Inject and use the corresponding mock repository interface/class already used in the project.\n- Return a strongly typed model collection to the Index view.\n- Keep logic simple, deterministic, and read-only.\n\n3. Build the Index view:\n- Strongly type the view to the collection model.\n- Render a clear table/card list with key fields.\n- Add a per-row Details link using the entity Id.\n- Add a breadcrumb trail that includes Home -> Entity List.\n- Include an empty-state message when there is no data.\n\n4. Ensure navigation completeness:\n- Add or update layout menu links so the new list page is reachable.\n- Keep labels and route paths consistent with sitemap intent.\n\n5. Route and URL consistency checks:\n- Verify the attribute route path is human-readable and stable.\n- Ensure list URL and details URL are both reachable.\n- If sitemap.md exists, update it to include new list/details URLs.\n\n6. Validate behavior:\n- Build the project to catch compile-time issues.\n- Quickly smoke-test that list renders and Details links resolve.\n\n## UI/UX requirement for this repository\n\nWhen the task includes UI composition, Razor layout, styling, or navigation polish, invoke the custom sub-agent named UX UI Specialist first, then apply its output.\n\n## Output contract for responses\n\nWhen you complete work with this skill, report:\n- Files changed\n- New routes/URLs\n- How list links to details\n- Navigation and breadcrumb updates\n- Any assumptions made\n\n## Example invocations\n\n- /mvc-list-page Dodaj list stranicu za Alerts s rutom /alerts i linkovima na /alerts/{id}\n- /mvc-list-page Pro+íiri Purchases index s novim stupcem TriggerType i boljim empty state prikazom\n- /mvc-list-page Napravi listu za Reports koriste-çi mock repo i uklju-ěi breadcrumb"},"tool_use_id":"call_fEcy0NF2YyBmojjIulvvJxo0__vscode-1776965303115","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _decisions.SingleOrDefault(d => d.Id == id);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_RvjzoEQygAy4Akf8V6weMmO6__vscode-1776965303149","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

{"timestamp":"2026-04-23T19:06:11.253Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"9e504b1a-b9d3-4825-88cc-5c468bcb3b46","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\lo14l\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\0e9afe2723d4389671589f5b36908849\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\9e504b1a-b9d3-4825-88cc-5c468bcb3b46.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker\\.github\\skills\\entity-framework\\SKILL.md","content":"---\nname: entity-framework\ndescription: Update EF Core models and relationships, generate and review migrations, and validate database-impacting changes safely in this ASP.NET MVC project.\nargument-hint: \"[change summary] [entity/model] [migration name]\"\n---\n\n# Entity Framework Skill\n\nUse this skill when a task changes EF Core domain classes, relationships, or persistence behavior.\n\n## When to use\n\nUse for requests like:\n- Add or modify a property in an EF model.\n- Add a new EF entity and wire it into DbContext.\n- Change relationship/cardinality (1-N, N-N, optional FK, cascade behavior).\n- Generate migration after model changes.\n- Review migration for safety before applying it.\n\nDo not use this skill for pure Razor/UI-only edits without EF changes.\n\n## Repository-aware conventions\n\n- Project path: impulse-spending-tracker/impulse-spending-tracker.csproj\n- DbContext: Data/ImpulseSpendingDbContext.cs\n- Models folder: Models/\n- Migrations folder: Migrations/\n- Prefer additive, backward-safe schema changes unless user explicitly requests destructive changes.\n\n## Required workflow\n\n1. Discover impact surface\n- Read affected model files in Models/.\n- Read Data/ImpulseSpendingDbContext.cs for DbSet and Fluent API rules.\n- Check repositories/controllers/views that consume changed fields.\n\n2. Implement model and DbContext changes\n- Add/adjust properties with clear nullability and defaults.\n- Update navigation properties and FK properties consistently.\n- Add/update DbSet<T> and Fluent API configuration where needed.\n- Preserve existing naming and coding style.\n\n3. Generate migration\n- Use a descriptive migration name in PascalCase, e.g. AddCooldownDecisionEntity.\n- Preferred command from repository root:\n  - dotnet ef migrations add <MigrationName> --project impulse-spending-tracker/impulse-spending-tracker.csproj --startup-project impulse-spending-tracker/impulse-spending-tracker.csproj\n\n4. Review migration quality\n- Verify Up/Down methods are symmetrical.\n- Flag potential data loss (drop/rename/type narrowing) before proceeding.\n- Ensure indexes, constraints, FK actions, and defaults match intent.\n\n5. Optional database update (only when requested)\n- dotnet ef database update --project impulse-spending-tracker/impulse-spending-tracker.csproj --startup-project impulse-spending-tracker/impulse-spending-tracker.csproj\n\n6. Validate app integrity\n- Build solution and resolve compile errors caused by schema/model changes.\n- Update any affected mock/test data paths if needed.\n\n## Safety rules\n\n- Do not apply destructive schema operations silently.\n- Do not remove existing columns/tables unless user asked explicitly.\n- Prefer explicit migrations over auto-generated assumptions left unreviewed.\n- If migration introduces risky operations, stop and summarize risk before applying DB update.\n\n## Output contract\n\nWhen done, report:\n- Files changed (models, DbContext, migration files, and dependent code)\n- Migration name\n- Schema impact summary\n- Whether database update was executed or skipped\n- Any assumptions and risks\n\n## Example invocations\n\n- /entity-framework Dodaj polje DecisionReason u Purchase i generiraj migraciju AddPurchaseDecisionReason\n- /entity-framework Dodaj novi entitet CooldownDecision s relacijom na UserProfile i napravi migraciju\n- /entity-framework Promijeni WishlistItem link da bude optional i pregledaj sigurnost migracije\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_9miACtPIo4rZzLOambpwvXg5__vscode-1776965303163","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}
